articles.full_text:
Efficient Exam Management Amidst Latur's Scorching Heat
In Latur, 16,070 students participated in the NEET UG 2026 exam. The exam was organized at 34 centers, with prepared arrangements reviewed by Collector Rahul Kumar Meena. Measures ensured student comfort amidst intense heat, offering shaded waiting areas and medical services. A control room addressed real-time issues.
In Latur, a total of 16,070 students undertook the NEET UG 2026 exam on Sunday, following rigorous planning and coordination by district officials.
Of the 16,285 students registered, 215 participants missed the exam, which proceeded across 34 designated centres. Collector Rahul Kumar Meena played a pivotal role, overseeing and refining logistical arrangements beforehand.
Amid the oppressive summer heat, authorities ensured facilities like shaded waiting areas, adequate drinking supply, and basic medical amenities were accessible. A control room was operational at the collectorate for addressing any student or parental issues as they arose.
(With inputs from agencies.)
